title: CCTV Video Analytics People-Count Trending
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="cctv:analytics" earliest=-30d
| where match(lower(analytic_type), "(?i)people|occupancy|count")
| eval count=tonumber(coalesce(people_count, occupancy, ""))
| timechart span=1h sum(count) by camera_id
description: People counting validates staffing, queue management, and emergency occupancy limits.
value: Informs operations and real-estate utilization without new sensors.
implementation: (1) Confirm edge vs server analytics latency. (2) GDPR/privacy review for regions.
grandmaExplanation: We track how many people cameras see moving through an area over time.
